message:
feat(text): implement rope-based text editing with undo/redo and views

This commit adds the complete text editing infrastructure including
rope-backed storage, styled segments, viewport management with wrap
modes, edit buffer with undo/redo, and the editor view for rendering.

src/text/mod.rs - Module Exports:
- Re-exports all text types for public API
- TextBuffer, EditBuffer, EditorView, TextBufferView
- WrapMode, VisualCursor, Selection types

src/text/rope.rs - Rope Wrapper:
RopeWrapper (backed by ropey crate):
- O(log n) insert/delete operations
- Persistent data structure (immutable snapshots)
- len_bytes(), len_chars(), len_lines()
- line(idx) -> Option<RopeSlice>
- insert(char_idx, text), remove(char_idx..end)
- slice(range) -> RopeSlice for substring access
- lines() iterator for efficient line traversal
- chars() iterator for character access

Benefits over String:
- Large text doesn't shift memory on edits
- Efficient line indexing without scanning
- Natural undo snapshot points

src/text/segment.rs - Styled Segments:
StyledSegment:
- byte_start, byte_end: Range in text
- style: Style to apply
- priority: u8 for overlap resolution

Segment Management:
- Higher priority styles override lower
- Used for syntax highlighting overlays
- Efficient iteration by position

src/text/buffer.rs - TextBuffer:
TextBuffer struct:
- rope: RopeWrapper for text storage
- segments: Vec<StyledSegment> for styling
- default_style: Style for unstyled text
- tab_width: u8 (default 8)
- mem_registry: MemRegistry for external refs
- syntax_styles: Optional SyntaxStyleRegistry
- revision: u64 for change detection

Operations:
- new(text, default_style): Create buffer
- len_bytes/chars/lines(): Size queries
- line(idx): Get line content
- style_at(byte_idx): Resolve style with priority
- add_highlight(range, style, priority, ref_id)
- remove_highlights_by_ref(ref_id): Batch removal
- clear_highlights(): Remove all styling

src/text/view.rs - TextBufferView:
TextBufferView struct:
- viewport: {x, y, width, height}
- wrap_mode: WrapMode enum
- selection: Optional Selection
- scroll_x, scroll_y: View offset
- line_cache: Cached line info

WrapMode enum:
- None: No wrapping, horizontal scroll
- Char: Break at any character
- Word: Break at word boundaries (whitespace)

Operations:
- set_viewport(x, y, w, h)
- set_wrap_mode(mode)
- scroll_to(x, y): Pan view
- ensure_visible(offset): Auto-scroll to position
- render_to_buffer(buffer, text_buffer): Draw text

Line Cache:
- Precomputed line starts and widths
- Virtual line mapping for wrap modes
- Invalidated on text or viewport changes

Selection:
- anchor/focus model (can be backwards)
- render with selection_style
- local selection for viewport-relative

src/text/edit.rs - EditBuffer:
EditBuffer struct:
- buffer: TextBuffer
- cursor: Cursor {offset, row, col}
- history: History for undo/redo

Cursor struct:
- offset: Character position in buffer
- row, col: Line and column (0-based)

Movement Operations:
- move_left/right(): Single character
- move_up/down(): Line navigation
- move_word_left/right(): Word boundaries
- move_to_line_start/end(): Line boundaries
- goto_line(n): Jump to line number

Edit Operations:
- insert(char): At cursor position
- delete_backward/forward(): Backspace/delete
- delete_word_backward/forward(): Word deletion
- delete_line(): Remove entire line

History System:
- EditOp enum: Insert{offset, text}, Delete{offset, text}
- Groups: Operations between commit() calls
- undo(): Restore previous group
- redo(): Reapply undone group
- max_depth: Configurable limit (default 1000)

Inversion for Undo:
- Insert -> Delete (save inserted text)
- Delete -> Insert (save deleted text)

src/text/editor.rs - EditorView:
EditorView struct:
- edit_buffer: EditBuffer
- view: TextBufferView
- cursor_style: Style for cursor cell
- cursor_shape: Block, Underline, Bar
- selection_style: Style for selected text
- line_numbers: bool (gutter display)
- scroll_margin: f32 (keep cursor visible)
- selection_follow_cursor: bool

Visual Cursor Navigation:
- move_up_visual/down_visual(): For wrapped text
- get_visual_sol/eol(): Visual line boundaries
- move_to_visual_sol/eol(): Jump to visual edges

Rendering:
- render(buffer): Draw text with cursor
- render_line_numbers(buffer): Gutter with styling
- scroll_to_cursor(): Keep cursor in viewport

Scroll Margin:
- Percentage of viewport height
- Triggers scroll before cursor hits edge
- Smooth scrolling experience

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
